response.justification: The candidate brings genuine geospatial experience (founder of GISCollective, a geo-data platform used by Green Map) and proven low-latency systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second with async I/O and caching, plus a strong quality/testing culture. However, the role's primary requirement is modern C++ or Rust: his C++ experience is brief and dated (a seven-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis), his systems work was in DLang, and he has no Rust. He also has no direct navigation or routing-pipeline experience, and his recent years have shifted toward TypeScript/Node web product work.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial/GIS platform experience, including founding and operating an open-source geo-data platform
Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic
Strong software quality practices: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, active Linux/Docker/Kubernetes experience
concerns: Modern C++ experience is minimal and roughly a decade old; no Rust experience
No direct navigation, routing, or map-tiling pipeline experience
Recent roles (2020-present) center on TypeScript/Node web and product work, away from systems programming
